# HPD.ML.DataSources.ParquetOptions

- Package: `HPD-ML-DataSources` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.DataSources`

Configuration for Parquet loading.

## Properties

### BatchSize

```csharp
public int BatchSize { get; init; }
```

Batch size for columnar reads. Default: 4096.

### Columns

```csharp
public System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<string>? Columns { get; init; }
```

Specific columns to read. Default: null (all columns). Column projection is pushed down to the Parquet reader for efficiency.

### RowGroups

```csharp
public System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<int>? RowGroups { get; init; }
```

Row group indices to read. Default: null (all row groups). Useful for partitioned processing.
